chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3411 of 2014 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on Nazir’s report dated 12.08.2014 2.For hearing of CMA No.17100/2014 3.For hearing of main case. 07.02.2025 Mr.Aqeel Ahmed, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Iqbal Khurram, Advocate for Respondent No.2 Mr.Adnan Ahmed, Advocate for Respondent No.4 Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that provisional assessment was taken place on 04.07.2014, however, finalization is pending due to this petition. Learned counsel further states that it may be just and proper to dispose of this petition with directions to the respondent Department to finalize the assessment after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the respondent Department has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in such terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
